name: awb
desc: Air Waybill, or more commonly known as an AWB or a [tracking number](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tracking_number), most commonly used in tracking parcels, shipments, despite the name it's based on having a [different meaning altogether](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Air_waybill).

name: balkanism
desc: circus, noise, commotion, uproar, confusion (Romanian: țigăneală, romnâeală)

Specific in countries part of the Balkans (Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Bulgaria, Croatia, Greece, Kosovo, Montenegro, North Macedonia, Romania, Serbia, Slovenia, Turkey), balkanism is usually a collection of actions related to confusion, corruption, idiocy, mostly aimed at, or from, governments or politics as a whole. It is most often used as a negative, or a pejorative, where a country or region is in perpetual political conflict, ethnic distrust, and fragmentation.

Example of balkanism: The July 2025 political shitshow and absolute, utter circus, happening with the Romanian education system, and the Romanian job market. Well, most things in the Romanian government are a vile, disgusting balkanism.

name: fomo
desc: FOMO, or Fear of Missing Out, is a tactic used commonly in the games industry, predominantly in 'live service' games, or games that receive content on a timely basis. Examples of this include HITMAN World of Assassination, where Elusive Targets are vehicles for FOMO cosmetics such as map-specific suit and item reskins. Additionally, FOMO is employed through the use of content that can be exclusively obtained by watching Twitch and TikTok content related to HITMAN. [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fear_of_missing_out)

name: gapps
desc: Google Play Apps, or Google Play Services. GAPPS generally means Google Play Services, plus other Google-provided apps such as Google, YouTube, Gmail, Google Maps, that come pre-installed on an Android device that comes equipped with Google Play Services.

name: griftiverse
desc: A broader group or topic that is filled with grifters, con artists, scams, etc. People part of such a Griftiverse include Andrew and his brother, Tristan Tate, Shiva Ayyadurai, Elon Musk, and most pseudo-science, pseudo-reality shmucks, anti-vax and snake oil sellers you'll find online.

name: grok
desc: Grok, the AI chatbot from Elon Musk's Twitter/X. Alternatively nicknamed "Gork". Gork (noun, medical slang, usually disparaging) stands for *"a terminal patient whose brain is nonfunctional and the rest of whose body can be kept functioning only by the extensive use of mechanical devices and nutrient solutions"*. [Merriam-Webster](https://www.merriam-webster.com/medical/gork)

name: idiotoid
desc: idiotoid (pl. idiotoids), idiotoism

Based on the Romanian slang for dumbass-oid, idiot-oid *(Romanian tâmpitoid, tâmpitoidism, tâmpitoizi)*, can be used as a synonym for idiotic. The `-oid` suffix usually means that it's a second composition element of scientific composition with the meaning of "in the form of".

name: llm
desc: Large Language Model, a language model trained with supervised machine learning designed for natural language processing tasks, such as language / text generation. LLMs are NOT the saving grace people in the Griftiverse make it out to be. It's NOT self-aware, it has no consciousness, creativity, etc. It's not human, intelligent, and should not be anthropomorphized. [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Large_language_model)

name: moscowite
desc: Which belongs to, Originates from, regarding Moscow or moscowits. Conjugation - Moscowite, Moscowites (Romanian conjugation - moscovit, moscoviți (masculine), moscovită, moscovite (feminine)). Synonym - Russian. French - moscovite [DexOnline](https://dexonline.ro/definitie/moscovit)

name: ordinary
desc: **If the current word has this as a glossary tooltip, it does NOT refer to ordinary, as in 'regular', 'frequent', 'normal'!**
Ordinary in this sense, is based on the negative, or pejorative Romanian meaning of the word.
Ordinary, as in awful, rude, vile, disgusting, vulgar, bad.
Example: Ordinary balkanism. *"This is an example of ordinary balkanism"* - vile balkanism.

name: schnook
desc: (slang) a stupid or unimportant person, dolt. [Merriam Webster](https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/schnook)

name: shlub
desc: (slang) a stupid, worthless, or unattractive person. [Merriam Webster](https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/shlub)

name: ue5lumen
desc: Lumen is Unreal Engine 5's fully dynamic global illumination and reflections system, designed for next-gen consoles and computers. Lumen can render diffuse interreflection with infinite bounces. [Unreal Engine 5 Documentation](https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/unreal-engine/lumen-global-illumination-and-reflections-in-unreal-engine)

name: ue5nanite
desc: Nanite is Unreal Engine 5's virtualized geometry system which uses a new internal mesh format and rendering technology to render pixel scale detail and high object counts. It intelligently does work on only the detail that can be perceived and no more. Nanite's data format is also highly compressed, and supports fine-grained streaming with automatic level of detail. [Unreal Engine 5 Documentation](https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/unreal-engine/nanite-virtualized-geometry-in-unreal-engine)

name: voiceactor
desc: Voice Actor (often abbreviated as VA). [Merriam Webster](https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/voice%20actor)

name: 7z
desc: 7zip archive and file format. [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/7z)

name: apk
desc: Android Package file format, usually an installable application or application component part of an Android bundle. [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Apk_(file_format))

name: jxl
desc: the JPEG-XL file format. [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/JPEG_XL)

name: vpk
desc: Valve Pack file format, used in Source Engine and Source 2. [Valve Developer Community](https://developer.valvesoftware.com/wiki/VPK_(file_format))

name: atp
desc: AlexTECPlayz. It's me!

name: prisonia
desc: PRISONIA, Vanta Interactive's top-down 2D prison management simulator game currently in development using the Sapphire Engine, and previously, Unreal Engine. [Website](https://vantainteractive.com/en/games/prisonia)

name: sapphire
desc: Sapphire Game Engine, a proprietary hard fork of the Godot Engine with custom changes on top, used by Vanta Interactive (and therefore, AlexTECPlayz) to develop games. PRISONIA is an example of such a game. [Website](https://vantainteractive.com/en/sapphire)

name: vi
desc: Vanta Interactive, Alex' indie game development studio name. [Website](https://vantainteractive.com)

name: godot
desc: [Godot](https://godotengine.org), a cross-platform, open-source, MIT-licensed game editor and game engine. Works on Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, Windows, visionOS, the web, and on consoles through third-party providers. Sapphire Game Engine is a hard fork of this.

name: barb
desc: Build A Rocket Boy, developers of EVERYWHERE and MindsEye, published by IO Interactive.

name: epicgames
desc: Epic Games, a game development and publishing studio lead by Tim Sweeney.

name: ioi
desc: IO Interactive, developers and publishers of the Hitman series, and the HITMAN World of Assassination trilogy. Fantastic games ruined by a greedy, out-of-touch leadership.

name: andrewtate
desc: Turbo misogynist and criminal. Leads the 'Hustlers University', where wannabe "alpha males" learn how to mistreat and harass women and minorities, because that's apparently appealing to most women (no, it's not - as a woman, this creeps me the fuck out and is a massive red flag) and is supposedly a masculine thing to do.

In his view, women are there to serve *him*, there's no equality whatsoever - what he says goes - women are there to cook, clean, have and take care of kids while he's out there half-naked smoking a cigar telling other men what to do, in a sort of homoerotic fantasy that seemingly doesn't seem at all questionable.

Involved in human trafficking and multiple sexual abuse scandals, loves to harass and abuse women for all kinds of reasons. name: donaldtrump
desc: What isn't there to say about this sociopathic cunt that's the 45th and 47th POTUS?
**NOTE: This section may not always be up to date, and is certainly not detailed enough!**

Rapist, sexual abuser, racist, senile bastard. Famous liar and conman, convicted felon, conspiracy theorist, fascist, neo-Nazi simp, Russian KGB agent (unconfirmed, under the codename Krasnov), leader of his MAGA cult of personality, unbelievable narcissist and cruel, sadistic fuck that had a disastruous first presidency, and the current one is significantly worse, both for his own MAGA supporters and everyone else. Bombed Iran, didn't stop Russia from continuing its war on Ukraine, didn't stop Israel from continuing its genocide in Palestine. So much for the 'pro-peace' president that's famously been in Putin's pocket even before becoming 45th POTUS.

[Not a convicted rapist](https://www.snopes.com/news/2024/01/17/trump-convicted-of-rape/), due to a [legal technicality](https://www.newsweek.com/fact-check-was-donald-trump-found-guilty-rape-1799935) linked to New York state's narrow statutory definition of rape

Severely anti-LGBTQ+, pro white supremacy, neo-Nazism, fascism, a complete denialist of climate change, anti-immigration, Trump was found guilty of 34 charges that have been later elevated to felony charges due to being part of a conspiracy that tried to influence the 2016 presidential election. Also indicted on two cases related to his efforts to overturn the 2020 presidential election and 2021 coup attempt, plus being charged with espionage due to mishandling of classified documents. Donny over here just doesn't give up, regardless of how much shit he does.
And despite all of this, his reputation was high enough for him to become the 47th POTUS following the 2024 presidential election. Jesus fucking Christ.
**Nicknames:** *Agent Orange, Krasnov, Orange Man, Drumpf, The Donald, Teflon Don, Inmate 47, Trumpanzee*

name: drewdevault
desc: [Defends pedophiles, watches loli/shota content](https://dmpwn.info/), all while having penned [the Stallman Report](https://stallman-report.org/), ironically enough.

The Stallman Report is a a hit piece where he criticized Stallman for his tone-deaf support of CSAM, while at the same time, running a reddit source-finder bot on specific subreddits including one that was banned by reddit for posting CSAM, and also translating and tagging specific posts on Danbooru via a Platinum profile, which includes tagging and translating from Japanese a multitude of loli / young depictions of anime girls. While some of Drew's posts including Hyprland MAY be accurate, Drew himself is not without issue, and I condemn him for his actions, just like I condemn others for similar stuff - including Stallman.
As of October 2025, Drew DeVault has not addressed these allegations in any way.
